name: reply_to_comment
description: Post a reply to a specific comment on one of the authenticated user's media posts. The reply appears as a nested comment under the parent comment.

parameters.name: comment_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the parent comment to reply to.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The text of the reply comment.
parameters.example: Thank you! This was taken in Malibu, California.

body.message: Thank you! This was taken in Malibu, California.
